description_long: This is a round-bottomed glass bottle with a long, narrow neck and a cork stopper sealing the top. The main body of the bottle is filled with a dark red liquid, visible through the transparent glass. A tan paper label with a circular black symbol and some text is affixed to the front of the bottle, giving it an old-fashioned or alchemical appearance. The glass surface is smooth and glossy, reflecting light and showing the liquid's meniscus clearly. The cork at the top appears slightly textured and fits snugly into the neck. There are no visible signs of damage or wear on the bottle, and the label is neatly applied.
description: A round glass bottle with a cork stopper, filled with dark red liquid and featuring a tan label with a black symbol on the front. The bottle is smooth, glossy, and transparent.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tan label with a black circular symbol and text, the dark red liquid inside, and the cork stopper.
description_view_1: Left-side view revealing the curvature of the bottle, the edge of the label, and the dark red liquid inside.
description_view_2: Rear view with the label partially visible through the glass and the dark red liquid clearly seen.
description_view_3: Right-side view showing the opposite edge of the label and the round shape of the bottle filled with liquid.
attribute_label_or_branding: A tan paper label with a black circular symbol and some text, placed on the front of the bottle.
